Petitioner The People Of The State Of California, By And Through The California Corporations Commissioner'S Order To Show Cause Regarding Compliance With Investigatory Subpoenas And Subpoenas Duces Tecum
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner The People of The State Of California, by and through the California Corporations Commissioner's Order To Show Cause Regarding Compliance with Investigatory Subpoenas and Subpoenas Duces Tecum. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, dismissal of entire action filed on December 23, 2009. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
